label: Signal Compare
description: Compare two signals with overlay plot, difference plot, and error statistics (MSE, SNR, max error).

parameters.label: Code
parameters.default:
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

_ref = np.array(${ref_var}, dtype=float)
_test = np.array(${test_var}, dtype=float)
_n = min(len(_ref), len(_test))
_ref, _test = _ref[:_n], _test[:_n]
_diff = _ref - _test

# Error statistics
_mse = np.mean(_diff**2)
_max_err = np.max(np.abs(_diff))
_snr = 10*np.log10(np.mean(_ref**2) / _mse) if _mse > 0 else float('inf')

fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(10, 7), sharex=True)
axes[0].plot(_ref, 'b-', alpha=0.8, label='${ref_label}')
axes[0].plot(_test, 'r--', alpha=0.8, label='${test_label}')
axes[0].set_title('Signal Comparison')
axes[0].legend()
axes[0].grid(True, alpha=0.3)

axes[1].plot(_diff, 'g-', linewidth=0.8)
axes[1].set_title(f'Error (MSE={_mse:.2e}, Max={_max_err:.2e}, SNR={_snr:.1f} dB)')
axes[1].grid(True, alpha=0.3)

axes[2].semilogy(np.abs(_diff) + 1e-20, 'm-', linewidth=0.8)
axes[2].set_title('Absolute Error (log scale)')
axes[2].set_xlabel('Sample')
axes[2].grid(True, alpha=0.3)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
print(f'MSE: {_mse:.6e} | Max Error: {_max_err:.6e} | SNR: {_snr:.1f} dB')
